MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL (TRANSACTION ID # 100185368) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALLORY PROPERTIES, LLC HEARING SET FOR JAN-13-2023 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL IS OFF CALENDAR. NO VALID PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. THE PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON DECEMBER 16, 2022 ATTESTS UNDER THE PENALTY OF PERJURY THAT A SEALED ENVELOPE CONTAINING THE MOTION WAS SERVED TO AN UNDISCLOSED E-MAIL ADDRESS ON PAUL UTRECHT FROM AN UNDISCLOSED E-MAIL ADDRESS OF THE SENDER. THE COURT ALSO NOTES THAT PLAINTIFF APPEARS TO SEEK TO SET ASIDE "THE AUGUST 19, 2016 ORDER OF DISMISSAL (MOTION 3:4). THERE IS NO SUCH ORDER ON FILE. THIS ACTION WAS FILED ON NOVEMBER 1, 2016. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL is OFF CALENDAR. No valid proof of service on file. The Proof of Service filed on December 16, 2022 attests under the penalty of perjury that a sealed envelope containing the motion was served to an undisclosed e-mail address on Paul Utrecht from an undisclosed e-mail address of the sender. The Court also notes that Plaintiff appears to seek to set aside "the August 19, 2016 order of dismissal (Motion 3:4). There is no such order on file. This action was filed on November 1, 2016.
